framework.name: AI Supervision Architecture for Agent Economies
framework.description: Multi-agent oversight system where 17+ LLM-driven AI agents continuously monitor, audit, optimize and safeguard an autonomous agent economy. Suggests agents-watching-agents as a governance model.
framework.raw_quote: XYZ.Credit runs on a sophisticated AI supervision architecture powered by more than 17 LLMdriven AI agents continuously monitoring, auditing, optimizing and safeguarding the agent economy.

source.title: Nilfee powers USDC-based neo banking for humans, XYZ CREDIT is designed exclusively for AI agents.
